item.name: Insert or update user attendance records

request.name: Insert or update user attendance records

description.content:
Inserts or updates attendance records for a user. Each entry corresponds to one day.
The `shouldBe` and `vacationTime` fields are optional.

**Important:** The date range constraint does not mean a limit of 100 entries, but rather that the maximum range between the earliest and latest dates in the payload must not exceed 100 days.

Creates an attendance request for a specified user and date.
The request can be created by the user themselves or by an administrator/supervisor for another user.
Depending on permissions and day type settings, the request may be auto-approved or require manual approval.
Note: This is a beta version.
Checks if the current user has any pending attendance requests to process. Note: This is a beta version.
Returns attendance calendar data for users in a date range. Note: This is a beta version.
List of all predefined days assigned directly to given group. Note: This is a beta version.

TimeCamp time tracking and timesheet REST API - time entries, timer, tasks and projects, users and groups, attendance, timesheet approvals, computer activities, tags, billing rates, expenses, and data export. Authenticate with your per-user API token (Profile Settings in the TimeCamp app) sent as a bearer token. Grounded in TimeCamp's published OpenAPI at https://developer.timecamp.com/reference/dist/api-prod.yaml.
